## Quality Gates

- [ ] `pnpm comments:check`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] Relevant tests pass (`unit` / `integration` / `e2e`)
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Feature Commit Discipline

- [ ] This PR uses feature-complete commits only.
- [ ] Each feature commit includes implementation, tests, required comments/JSDoc, and docs updates when behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not commit directly to `development` or `master`.
